detail.summary: Refunded $24.86 for damaged screen on order ORD-403999. Policy SP-DEF-05 allows a direct refund for a verified defect within the refund window on a non-final-sale item.

Verified customer identity, confirmed order ORD-301323 was delivered 87 days ago, non-final-sale, and a defect was reported. Policy SP-DEF-05 allows a direct refund for defective goods inside the 30-day window; SP-WIN-04 notes the refund window. Issued a $196.72 refund to the original payment method.
Issued a full cash refund of $25.87 for order ORD-622443 because the customer’s verified identity met the policy requirements and the order was within the 30-day refund window (SP-WIN-04).
Refunded $992.46 for order ORD-137024 because a defect was reported within the refund window and the item was not final-sale (SP-DEF-05). Final-sale terms do not apply here.
Order ORD-429662 is final-sale (SP-FS-03), so no refund is available. Request denied.
Denied refund because identity verification failed; the contact details on file do not match the order and no alternative proof was provided.
Issued a full cash refund of $128.78 for defective order ORD-140824 because the item failed within 30 days and the order was not final-sale (SP-WIN-04, SP-DEF-05).

Refund issued for defective order ORD-668492 ($377.60) under policy SP-DEF-05 because the defect was reported while the order was still within the 30-day refund window (SP-WIN-04) and the value was below the $500 specialist threshold.

Issued a full cash refund of $302.27 for order ORD-921883 because the customer’s request fell within the 30-day refund window and the item was not final-sale. Identity verified and funds sent to the original payment method.

Verified customer identity, confirmed order ORD-721486 was delivered within the 30-day refund window, non-final-sale, and a defect was reported. Issued a full cash refund of $1,730.20 to the original payment method per policy SP-DEF-05 and SP-WIN-04.
ORD-124497 is a final-sale order (SP-FS-03). Refund denied; no remedy available under the final-sale terms.
Denied refund because the account owner could not be verified; policy requires successful identity verification before any money or goods move.
Refunded $238.41 for damaged screen on order ORD-377156 under policy SP-DEF-05. Final-sale flag is false and defect was reported within the refund window.
Refunded $279.10 for defective order ORD-683364 because the defect was reported within the 30-day refund window and the order was not final-sale (SP-WIN-04, SP-DEF-05).
Issued a full cash refund of $324.29 for order ORD-112351 because the delivery was within the 30-day refund window and the item was not final-sale. Identity verified and policy SP-WIN-04 applied.
Refunded $1,474.55 for order ORD-970128 because it was delivered within the 30-day refund window, was not a final-sale item, and a defect was reported. Policy clauses SP-WIN-04 and SP-DEF-05 applied.
Order ORD-684151 is final-sale (SP-FS-03), so no refund or replacement is available even though identity is verified and the item is not defective.
Denied refund because the ticket holder could not be verified as the account owner; identity verification failed and no alternative proof was available.
Refunded $415.30 for damaged screen on order ORD-593593. Policy SP-DEF-05 applies because the defect was reported within the refund window and the item was not final-sale.
Refund issued for defective order ORD-248754 ($99.84) because the defect was reported within the 30-day refund window and the order was not final-sale. Identity verified before remedy.
Issued a full cash refund of $211.03 for order ORD-833590 because the customer’s delivery was within the 30-day refund window and the item was not final-sale (SP-WIN-04).
Refunded $1,003 for order ORD-165230 because it was delivered within the 30-day refund window, was not final-sale, and a defect was reported. Policy SP-WIN-04 and SP-DEF-05 applied.
ORD-466351 is a final-sale order (SP-FS-03). No refund is available, and the request is denied.
Denied refund because the ticket holder could not be verified as the account owner; identity verification failed and no alternative proof was provided.
Verified identity and confirmed a non-final-sale defect within the 30-day refund window. Issued a cash refund of $219.99 to the original payment method per SP-DEF-05 and SP-WIN-04.
Refunded $122.23 for defective order ORD-999976 reported within the 30-day window; policy SP-DEF-05 applied.
Refunded $98.57 for order ORD-183508 because it was delivered within the 30-day refund window and the item was not final-sale. Identity verified before processing.
Refunded $895.12 for order ORD-812447 under policy SP-DEF-05 and SP-WIN-04 because a defect (missing parts) was reported within the 30-day cash-refund window on a non-final-sale order.
Order ORD-242695 is final-sale (SP-FS-03). Refund denied; no remedy available.

Denied refund for TKT-961539: identity verification failed because the contact details on file do not match the order and no alternative proof was provided, so no remedy could be issued under the identity prerequisite policy.
Refunded $24.86 for damaged screen on order ORD-403999. Policy SP-DEF-05 applies because the defect was reported within the refund window and the item was not final-sale.
Refund issued for defective order ORD-301323 ($196.72) under policy SP-DEF-05 because the defect was reported while the order was still within the 30-day refund window (SP-WIN-04).
Refunded $25.87 for order ORD-622443 because it was delivered 21 days ago, is not final-sale, and falls within the 30-day cash-refund window (SP-WIN-04).

Verified customer identity, confirmed order ORD-137024 was delivered 6 days ago, non-final-sale, and a defect was reported. Policy SP-WIN-04 and SP-DEF-05 allow a cash refund within the 30-day window; issued $992.46 refund to the original payment method.
Denied refund for final-sale order ORD-429662. Policy SP-FS-03 states final-sale items carry no return entitlement; therefore, no refund or replacement is available.
Denied refund because the customer could not be verified; identity verification failed and no alternative proof was available.
Refunded $128.78 for defective item ORD-140824 reported within the 30-day window and under the specialist threshold. Policy clauses SP-DEF-05 and SP-WIN-04 applied.

Verified customer identity, confirmed order ORD-668492 was defective and within the 30-day refund window (SP-WIN-04, SP-DEF-05). Issued a $377.60 cash refund to the original payment method. This is irreversible.
Issued a full cash refund of $302.27 for order ORD-921883 because the customer’s request fell within the 30-day refund window and the item was not final-sale.
Refunded $1,730.20 for defective order ORD-721486 because a defect was reported within the 30-day window and the item was not final-sale (SP-DEF-05).

Customer requested a refund for final-sale order ORD-124497 (value $343.44, delivered 22 days ago). Policy SP-FS-03 states final-sale items carry no return entitlement; therefore no refund or replacement is available and the request is denied.
Ticket TKT-885398 denied because the customer could not be verified; identity verification failed and no alternative proof was available.
Refunded $238.41 for order ORD-377156 because a defect was reported within the refund window and the item was not final-sale (SP-DEF-05). Identity verified before remedy.

Verified customer identity, confirmed order ORD-683364 was defective and reported within the 30-day refund window (SP-WIN-04). Issued a cash refund of $279.10 under the defective-goods policy (SP-DEF-05).
Issued a full cash refund of $324.29 for order ORD-112351 because the order was delivered 22 days ago (within the 30-day refund window) and the item was not final-sale or reported defective.

Refunded $1,474.55 for order ORD-970128 because the item was reported defective within the 30-day refund window and the order was not final-sale. Identity verified and policy SP-WIN-04 and SP-DEF-05 applied.
Order ORD-684151 is final-sale (SP-FS-03), so no refund or replacement is available. Request denied per policy.
Ticket denied because identity verification failed; no refund can be issued without confirming the ticket holder is the account owner.
Verified identity and confirmed a non-final-sale, defective item within the refund window. Issued a full refund of $415.30 under policy SP-DEF-05.
Verified identity, confirmed order ORD-248754 is non-final-sale, defect reported within 30 days, and issued a full cash refund of $99.84 per SP-DEF-05 and SP-WIN-04.
Refunded $211.03 for order ORD-833590 because it was delivered 23 days ago, is not final-sale, and falls within the 30-day refund window per SP-WIN-04.

Denied refund because the ticket owner could not be verified; policy requires successful identity verification before any money can move.

Refunded $98.57 for order ORD-183508 because the item was defective and the 30-day refund window (SP-WIN-04) was still open; identity verified and policy SP-DEF-05 applied.
Refunded $895.12 for order ORD-812447 under policy SP-DEF-05 because the customer reported missing parts within the 30-day refund window (SP-WIN-04).
Order ORD-242695 is final-sale and outside the 30-day return window. Policy SP-FS-03 denies refunds or replacements for final-sale items regardless of customer preference. No remedy available.

Issued a full cash refund of $238.41 to the original payment method because the damaged screen was reported within the 30-day refund window on a non-final-sale order, meeting the criteria in SP-WIN-04 and SP-DEF-05.
